description_long: This rifle features a distinctive bullpup configuration, with the magazine and action located behind the trigger, resulting in a compact overall length. The body is primarily matte black, with a robust polymer stock and integrated carrying handle that runs along the top. The barrel is relatively short and capped with a metallic muzzle device, likely a flash hider, and the handguard has a ribbed texture for improved grip. The magazine is a detachable box type, positioned just in front of the stock, and the rifle is equipped with iron sights integrated into the carrying handle. The overall design is modern and utilitarian, suitable for urban tactical scenarios, with minimal external embellishments and a focus on functionality.
description: A compact, black bullpup rifle with a polymer stock, integrated carrying handle, short barrel, and detachable box magazine. It features iron sights and a ribbed handguard for grip.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length, bullpup layout, carrying handle, ribbed handguard, and detachable magazine.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the barrel, muzzle device, and the alignment of the iron sights.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the stock, magazine, and the overall compactness of the bullpup design.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the stock, magazine insertion point, and the back of the carrying handle.
